themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Gregory the Dialogist on Commentary on 1 Kings, Book 3, Chapter 3: 13. Concerning the strikin...". Word-study detail reinforces "אַ֔רְצָה: to the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "The men of Ashdod draw the correct conclusion: 'The ark of the God of Israel shall not abide...". Word-study detail reinforces "יֵשֵׁ֞ב: shall not abide - properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet)...".
